name: Chicken Fried Tofu w/ Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a 400 degree oven.
2. Slice tofu into 0.25 to 0.5 inch slices.
3. In a blender, combine the olive oil, garlic, and tamari. Blend on high speed for a few minutes.
4. Marinate the tofu slices in the mixture for about 15 minutes on a side.
5. Dredge the marinated tofu slices in bread crumbs.
6. Bake the tofu slices on a cookie sheet for 15 minutes per side.
White sauce:
1. Make a roux of 2 tablespoons flour and 2 tablespoons butter or margarine. Cook for a couple of minutes.
2. Add 1 cup of hot, scalded milk. Bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat, add salt and two dashes of Tabasco.
Suggested: Serve with rice.
